message:
Last summer, we had a surprise blackout that lasted a whole afternoon. I was curled up with a book, totally unaware, when my phone buzzed, and I realized the power was out. I could have panicked, but thankfully, I had stocked up on flashlights and power banks. I felt like the gloriously over-prepared person in the room! 

I dug out my trusty lantern and powered up my phone, just in case I needed to check in with family. We even had a little picnic in the living room with snacks from the fridge. The kids thought it was an adventure! 

It's funny how a little preparedness can turn an inconvenience into a memorable moment. Next time you're thinking about what to have on hand, consider those little extras that can keep the good times rolling—even in the dark. 

Have you ever found yourself unexpectedly prepared for a blackout? What’s your go-to backup plan?
